tagline: Home-based B2B pavement marking franchise with recurring commercial customers and a proven 25-year operating model
description_short: 1-800-STRIPER is a home-based franchise serving commercial property owners, contractors, and property managers with parking lot striping and pavement marking services. Franchisees build recurring B2B revenue with low overhead and no brick-and-mortar requirement. The affiliate-owned model has scaled to $1.4M in gross revenue, offering a validated pathway for owner-operators and executive-model buyers alike.
market_intelligence_insight: Global road marking materials market valued at $6.1B in 2024 and projected to reach $9.9B by 2034 at a 5% CAGR, driven by commercial infrastructure investment, safety compliance mandates, and rising parking lot maintenance demand across North America.
item_19_headline: Affiliate location achieved $1,400,809 gross revenue in 2024 with $652,505 remaining after COGS, rent, royalties, marketing, and software expenses
ongoing_support: field visits,annual conference,operations manual,software platform,national call center,marketing support,answering service
